stories.title: RealDash bridge stops broadcasting false zeros for missing sensors
acceptanceCriteria: realdash_bridge.py uses None (not 0) as default for missing sensor values
Frame packing functions skip or use last-known-good value instead of 0 for missing data
No RealDash frame sends 0 for a sensor that has never reported a value

stories.title: Alert engine does not fire false positives without real CAN data
acceptanceCriteria: All alert rules return None when insufficient data samples exist (minimum buffer guards)
Engine stall detection (rpm==0) requires minimum 100 samples before firing
No alerts fire when system starts with no CAN adapter connected
Engine state globals (warmup_complete, engine_start_time) are safe across system restarts

stories.title: Telemetry cache includes freshness timestamps
acceptanceCriteria: tool_executor.py telemetry cache includes _last_updated_ts for each sensor value
Mechanic LLM responses include data age when telemetry is older than 60 seconds
Stale telemetry (>5 min) is flagged as potentially outdated in mechanic responses

stories.title: Dashboard UI works without CAN hardware (no blocking overlays, no phantom data)
acceptanceCriteria: Hardware overlay has a SKIP button to dismiss without CAN data (already done)
No diagnostic banners or alerts appear without real sensor data
All gauge values show -- until real data arrives (no zeros masquerading as readings)
curl http://localhost:8080 returns page, curl /mechanic returns page, both with no fake alerts

stories.title: Remove empty placeholder modules and dead code
acceptanceCriteria: field_ops_kb.py either contains real entries or is removed/disabled cleanly
No TODO placeholders remain in deployed Python files that affect runtime behavior
voice_input.py references cleaned up (replaced by vivi.py)
